items.raw_excerpt: AMSTERDAM, July 2 : A skeleton found beneath a Maastricht church this year could not be conclusively identified as that of famed French musketeer Charles de Batz de Castelmore d'Artagnan, city authorities said on Thursday, with some findings raising fresh questions about the theory."For now, the true origin o
items.summary_en: A skeleton found beneath a church in Maastricht, Netherlands, could not be confirmed as the famous French musketeer Charles de Batz de Castelmore d'Artagnan. New research has raised doubts about the theory. The true identity of the bones remains a mystery.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 마스트리히트 교회 지하에서 발견된 유골이 유명한 프랑스 총사 달타냥의 것이라고 단정할 수 없다는 조사 결과가 나왔다. 새로운 연구는 기존 추정에 의문을 제기했다. 유골의 진짜 정체는 여전히 미궁 속에 남아 있다.
items.title_en: Skeleton under Dutch church may not be musketeer d'Artagnan
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 교회 지하 유골, '달타냥' 가능성 희박해져
items.title_original: Unclear if French musketeer d'Artagnan's bones were found, research shows

items.raw_excerpt: MEXICO CITY, July 2 : Amid the sea of green that washed over Mexico City after the country's World Cup victory over Ecuador on Tuesday, one shop defiantly hoisted the Ecuadorian flag and welcomed all the downtrodden fans of Mexico's opponents to a place of refuge. Welcome to the Losers Cafe, a coffee shop in
items.summary_en: A cafe in Mexico City called Losers Cafe welcomes fans of teams that lost to Mexico. The whole city celebrated a win over Ecuador, but this small coffee shop offered a safe place for sad Ecuador fans. The owner wanted to show that losing fans are not alone.
items.summary_ko: 멕시코시티에 있는 '루저스 카페'가 멕시코에 패배한 팀의 팬들을 맞이하고 있다. 도시 전체가 에콰도르전 승리를 축제하는 가운데, 이 작은 카페는 실망한 에콰도르 팬들에게 안전한 공간을 제공했다. 카페 주인은 진 팬들이 혼자가 아니라는 걸 보여주고 싶었다고 말했다.
items.title_en: Losers Cafe in Mexico City welcomes losing World Cup fans
items.title_ko: 멕시코시티 '루저스 카페', 월드컵에서 진 팬들의 안식처로
items.title_original: Eliminated but not alone: Mexico City cafe becomes haven for World Cup heartbreak

items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists discovered a 4,000-year-old sanctuary during excavations of the model industrial estate in the town of Tiel, located 72 kilometers from the Hague in the Netherlands.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists discovered a 4,000-year-old sanctuary in Tiel, Netherlands. The find came during excavations of a model industrial estate. Tiel is located 72 kilometers from The Hague.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 틸(Tiel)에서 고고학자들이 4,000년 된 성소를 발굴했습니다. 이 성소는 모범 산업단지 발굴 작업 중 발견되었습니다. 틸은 헤이그에서 72km 떨어져 있습니다.
items.title_original: Archaeologists find 4,000-year-old Sanctuary in Netherlands - Arkeonews
